title: Inventory initialization and tx_event_log usage paths
summary: Inventory findings: zed-agentops-init.sh touches .agent/tx_event_log.jsonl and seeds tx_state.json; RepoContext.set_repo_root wires tx_event_log paths; StateStore.tx_event_append/read_last_json_line/_tx_event_log_empty handle log IO; StateRebuilder.read_tx_event_log/read_recent_tx_events/_init_tx_state validate empty/missing logs; OpsTools._emit_tx_event rebuilds + tx_state_save; tool_registry requires actor/payload/session_id and tx_state_save requires state.
acceptance_criteria: All tx_event_log readers/writers and init entry points are listed with file locations.
Empty-log handling paths are identified, including rebuild and state defaults.
Tool input validation touchpoints (tx_event_append, tx_state_save) are mapped to init flows.

steps.description: Locate tx_event_log read/write and initialization paths in src/.
Document how empty or missing logs are handled in rebuild and state checks.
Map tool input validation requirements to init flows.

notes: RepoContext.set_repo_root wires tx_event_log; StateStore.tx_event_append/read_last_json_line/_tx_event_log_empty handle log IO.
OpsTools._emit_tx_event performs tx_event_append + rebuild + tx_state_save; tool_registry enforces actor/payload/session_id/state.
